ab: Musa su inu?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: Musa ku hmuma sama qnalang ssama.
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: Gaga su hmuya?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: Gisu ku mabal spriq, syuqun mu qsiya kiya hari da.
ch: B:我在拔草，等一下要澆水。
en: B: I'm pulling weeds and will be watering them later.

ab: Adas hini ka soki ni parih hug?
ch: A:把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來這兒，好嗎?
en: A: Bring your scythes and hoes here, will you?

ab: Gaga su bsaan inu?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: Bsai siyaw bkaruh.
en: A: Put it next to the plow rake.

ab: Tnbunan su da dxgal hug?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: Tnbunan mu sayang balay ka dxgal, saun mu smupu kiya da!
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: Tduwa ngalan ka hnuma su sama dhug?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: Tduwa smqic ka tmana hini da, ini na ka sama watan gaga.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的昭和草就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbage here is ready to be harvested, but the Showa grass there is not yet ready to be harvested.

ab: Wah! Tagay bi da knarig su banga nii.
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: (sighs) Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: Jiyagi ku pusa rpun hug?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: Gaga namu hmuya?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: Gaga nami pusa kaji qsurux.
en: B: We're releasing fishing nets to catch fish.

ab: Egu ka qsurux hini hug?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: Egu bi ka qsurux gaga ruwan rawa.
en: B: We caught a lot of fish in the fish basket.

ab: Shuya su qmraq ka qsurux hug?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: Mduuy ku sahu gamil qmraq qsurux.
en: B: I use poison ivy to catch fish.

ab: Mduuy su buji tmsamac hug?
en: A: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

ab: Powsa ku gasil seangal mu ssamac, mnsuwil ku madas puniq phuling uri.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱取得獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: I usually use traps to get my prey, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: Elug bowyak ka nii.
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: Ma su klaun?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: Dapil bowyak ka nii, kiya ni elug bowyak ka hini.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: Sai nhari qmita ka gasil ta, saw bi wada tjiyal samac da.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: Ma su mkla.
en: B: How do you know?

ab: Saw bi wada smknux ka huling da, saay ta nhari smnegul.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let's follow them.

ab: Gaga su smalu manu?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: Dangar ka nii, sqraq qowlic.
ch: B:這是石壓式陷阱，用來抓老鼠的。
en: B: This is a stone trap, used to catch rats.

ab: Manu ka gaga su psaan hiya?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: Gasil ka gaga, sqraq nami pada.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: Malu balay utux nami, egu bi ka nangal nami jiyax sayang.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: Kiya hmi! Dsun nami alang ni seasug mkan knealang.
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落好好分享吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let's take it back to the tribe and share it!
